title: Health Plus
description: A mod that allows a players max health to exceed the limit of 20!
body:
## HighTide's Health Plus
### What Does it Add?
HighTide's Health Plus is a mod for Minecraft Java Edition that adds an item called the Heart Container that allows the players health to exceed the current max of 20 health. Each heart container when used will add 2 health the the players max health or 1 full heart.

### Is it Balanced?
So far from testing and programming the mod, I have done a pretty good job on balancing the mod. As of right now, the balancing factor is the recipe for the heart container. You are able to figure out the recipe ingame and I don't want to spoil much.

### Why Should I Use This?
I personally am not one to tell you to use something but as someone who has beaten the game many many times and has really nothing to look forward to late game anymore. This mod will be a great pick. I plan on implementing a limit to the amount of hearts you can have later on but for right now, you can have an infinite amount. This makes it fun to grind for the resources required to craft a container and gives you something to work up to. Not to mention that it also might have some uses in automatic farms, making the chances of you dying to an accident much lower. 

### Final Words
I am very happy to launch this mod into the minecraft world and hope that the modding community finds uses for this mod in their games. Thanks for checking out this mod and have a great time playing with it :D
